original_image_tags: A single sheet of off-white paper with two punch holes at the top. The majority of the page contains faint, mirrored text that appears to be bleed-through from the reverse side. The paper has a slight curve or crease on the left side. At the bottom right, there is a clear, upright blue ink stamp.

elements.description: A faint, blue ink stamp near the bottom center containing the text 'RECEIVED', 'ATOMIC ENERGY LIAISON SECTION', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE F.B.I.', and the date 'APR 19 9 14 AM '49'.
Faint, inverted blue ink text near the top center reading 'OFFICE OF THE DEPUTY DIRECTOR' and 'OPERATIONS FOR POLITICAL AFFAIRS'.
Faint, inverted blue ink text near the bottom center reading 'SECRET' and '20'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed text from stamps ('RECEIVED', 'ATOMIC ENERGY LIAISON SECTION', 'SECRET', etc.) that Description A does not mention at all, creating a direct contradiction on the presence and content of key visual elements.
